data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for planned due dates and expected amounts.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding planned due dates and expected amounts, which is not sufficiently supported by the provided evidence. The prior step evidence does not include any details about installment schedules or their associated due dates and amounts, leading to an inconclusive status. The only related evidence points to bookings being made without confirming the necessary installment schedule rows, which are critical for this validation.
gaps: No evidence of installment schedule rows per order/invoice.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
